title: Iran war shows why AI should not be built by private companies

content:

title: After 33 years, it’s time to say goodbye to Real Estate Matters (part two)
description: Artificial intelligence isn’t just another technology shift. It’s a fundamental restructuring of how homes are built, discovered, bought, sold and managed. And it’s happening right now, almost at the speed of light.

title: AI in health care, CORA and gun bills
description: Bills to rein in artificial intelligence in health care, 3D-printed guns, CORA and captive audience pricing on docket at Colorado legislature.
content:
Bills to rein in artificial intelligence will be among the topics tackled by the Colorado legislature this week.
On Wednesday, the House Health and Human Services Committee is set to debate a pair of bills focused on AI use in health care.

title: U.S. Supreme Court declines to hear AI copyright case
description: The decision upheld a lower court ruling that artificial intelligence-generated content does not have the same legal protections as human-created work.

title: Are Software Stocks About to Become the Latest Victim of Wall Street’s AI Boom?
description: The disruptive potential of artificial intelligence appears to have sparked a widespread sell-off of software stocks. Are investor fears justified?

title: U.S. Supreme Court rejects AI copyright case: No human, no copyright
description: The U.S. Supreme Court just sidestepped one of the biggest legal questions hanging over generative AI. On Monday, the justices declined to hear a closely watched case that asked whether artwork created entirely by artificial intelligence can qualify for copyright protection under U.S. law. title: Musk’s xAI to Buy Back $3 Billion of Debt Early in Run-Up to IPO
description: Elon Musk’s artificial intelligence startup xAI is planning to pay back $3 billion of junk bonds early, according to people with knowledge of the matter and data compiled by Bloomberg.

title: Student Innovators Win National Recognition for AI-Powered Skin Health App
description: Students from a private school in Ahmedabad developed Derma Vision, an AI-based skin health application that identified skin conditions in a community screening. The app won the Best Innovative Idea in Artificial Intelligence at the Vigyantram National Championship and highlights early intervention's importance. It advises dermatological consultation when necessary.
content: Students from a private school in Ahmedabad have made headlines by developing an AI-based skin health application, Derma Vision, which flagged 50 cases requiring professional dermatological consultations during a community screening event. The app's ... [884 chars]
